question: How many times have I worn my new black Converse Chuck Taylor All Star sneakers?
reasoning_summary: Two memories mention worn counts: one says 4 times (including a birthday party), another says 6 times (yesterday). The later memory (6 times) supersedes the earlier one, so the current count is 6.

conflicts.resolution: The memory stating 4 times is earlier (2023-05-30T22:16:01) and is superseded by the later memory stating 6 times (2023-05-30T17:45:00.500000). The later memory is more recent and indicates the count has increased.
